title: TestPlanCreateParams
description: Parameters for creating a new test plan

name.description: Name for the new test plan

areaPath.description: Area path to associate with the test plan

iteration.description: Iteration path (sprint) to associate with the test plan

startDate.description: Start date of the test plan

endDate.description: End date of the test plan

buildDefinition.description: Build definition to associate for automated testing

buildId.description: Specific build ID to test against
